fullOutput:
<path>/home/user/code/pkgs/id/flake.nix</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: {
2:   description = "id - A peer-to-peer file sharing CLI built with Iroh";
3: 
4:   inputs = {
5:     nixpkgs.url = "github:NixOS/nixpkgs/nixos-unstable";
6:     rust-overlay.url = "github:oxalica/rust-overlay";
7:     flake-utils.url = "github:numtide/flake-utils";
8:   };
9: 
10:   outputs =
11:     {
12:       self,
13:       nixpkgs,
14:       rust-overlay,
15:       flake-utils,
16:     }:
17:     flake-utils.lib.eachDefaultSystem (
18:       system:
19:       let
20:         overlays = [ (import rust-overlay) ];
21:         pkgs = import nixpkgs { inherit system overlays; };
22: 
23:         # Rust toolchain from rust-toolchain.toml
24:         rustToolchain = pkgs.rust-bin.fromRustupToolchainFile ./rust-toolchain.toml;
25: 
26:         # Import shared configuration
27:         nixCommon = import ./nix-common.nix { inherit pkgs; };
28: 
29:         # Inherit from shared config
30:         inherit (nixCommon) buildInputs opensslEnv;
31:         nativeBuildInputs = [ rustToolchain ] ++ nixCommon.nativeBuildInputs;
32: 
33:         # Helper to create a check that runs a just command
34:         mkCheck =
35:           name: justCmd:
36:           pkgs.stdenv.mkDerivation {
37:             name = "id-${name}";
38:             src = ./.;
39:             inherit buildInputs nativeBuildInputs;
40:             OPENSSL_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_DIR;
41:             OPENSSL_LIB_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_LIB_DIR;
42:             OPENSSL_INCLUDE_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_INCLUDE_DIR;
43:             PKG_CONFIG_PATH = opensslEnv.PKG_CONFIG_PATH;
44:             buildPhase = ''
45:               export HOME=$(mktemp -d)
46:               export CARGO_HOME=$HOME/.cargo
47:               just ${justCmd}
48:             '';
49:             installPhase = ''
50:               mkdir -p $out
51:               echo "${name} passed at $(date)" > $out/result.txt
52:             '';
53:           };
54: 
55:         # Helper to create a script that runs in the project directory
56:         mkScript =
57:           name: script:
58:           pkgs.writeShellScriptBin name ''
59:             cd ${self}
60:             export OPENSSL_DIR="${opensslEnv.OPENSSL_DIR}"
61:             export OPENSSL_LIB_DIR="${opensslEnv.OPENSSL_LIB_DIR}"
62:             export OPENSSL_INCLUDE_DIR="${opensslEnv.OPENSSL_INCLUDE_DIR}"
63:             export PKG_CONFIG_PATH="${opensslEnv.PKG_CONFIG_PATH}"
64:             ${script}
65:           '';
66: 
67:         # Helper to create a runnable app
68:         mkApp = drv: {
69:           type = "app";
70:           program = "${drv}/bin/${drv.name}";
71:         };
72: 
73:       in
74:       {
75:         # Development shell: nix develop
76:         devShells.default = pkgs.mkShell {
77:           inherit buildInputs nativeBuildInputs;
78:           inherit (nixCommon) shellHook;
79: 
80:           OPENSSL_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_DIR;
81:           OPENSSL_LIB_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_LIB_DIR;
82:           OPENSSL_INCLUDE_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_INCLUDE_DIR;
83:           PKG_CONFIG_PATH = opensslEnv.PKG_CONFIG_PATH;
84:         };
85: 
86:         # =======================================================================
87:         # Formatter: nix fmt
88:         # Runs 'just fix' to format Rust and web code
89:         # =======================================================================
90:         formatter = pkgs.writeShellScriptBin "formatter" ''
91:           exec ${pkgs.just}/bin/just fix
92:         '';
93: 
94:         # =======================================================================
95:         # Checks: nix flake check
96:         # Uses 'ci' command (read-only, no auto-fix modifications)
97:         # =======================================================================
98:         checks = {
99:           # CI-safe checks (read-only): fmt-check lint test test-web-unit test-web-typecheck doc
100:           default = mkCheck "ci" "ci";
101: 
102:           # Individual checks
103:           fmt-check = mkCheck "fmt-check" "fmt-check";
104:           lint = mkCheck "lint" "lint";
105:           test = mkCheck "test" "test";
106:           test-unit = mkCheck "test-unit" "test-unit";
107:           test-int = mkCheck "test-int" "test-int";
108:           test-web = mkCheck "test-web" "test-web";
109:           test-web-unit = mkCheck "test-web-unit" "test-web-unit";
110:           test-web-typecheck = mkCheck "test-web-typecheck" "test-web-typecheck";
111:           doc = mkCheck "doc" "doc";
112:           cargo-check = mkCheck "cargo-check" "cargo-check";
113:         };
114: 
115:         # =======================================================================
116:         # Packages: nix build
117:         # =======================================================================
118:         packages = {
119:           # Web-enabled package (primary product)
120:           id-web = pkgs.rustPlatform.buildRustPackage {
121:             pname = "id";
122:             version = "0.1.0";
123:             src = ./.;
124: 
125:             cargoLock = {
126:               lockFile = ./Cargo.lock;
127:               outputHashes = {
128:                 "distributed-topic-tracker-0.2.5" = "sha256-9wMDB1PGHuzxWiZeRQpGs1m9mTTcjbB7y3kSJomNjeY=";
129:               };
130:             };
131: 
132:             inherit buildInputs;
133:             nativeBuildInputs = [
134:               pkgs.pkg-config
135:               rustToolchain
136:               pkgs.bun
137:             ];
138: 
139:             OPENSSL_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_DIR;
140:             OPENSSL_LIB_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_LIB_DIR;
141:             OPENSSL_INCLUDE_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_INCLUDE_DIR;
142: 
143:             preBuild = ''
144:               # Build web assets with Bun
145:               cd web
146:               bun install --frozen-lockfile
147:               bun run build
148:               cd ..
149:             '';
150: 
151:             doCheck = true;
152: 
153:             meta = with pkgs.lib; {
154:               description = "A peer-to-peer file sharing CLI built with Iroh (with web UI)";
155:               license = with licenses; [
156:                 mit
157:                 asl20
158:               ];
159:             };
160:           };
161: 
162:           # Library-only package (no web UI, no bun required)
163:           id-lib = pkgs.rustPlatform.buildRustPackage {
164:             pname = "id-lib";
165:             version = "0.1.0";
166:             src = ./.;
167: 
168:             cargoLock = {
169:               lockFile = ./Cargo.lock;
170:               outputHashes = {
171:                 "distributed-topic-tracker-0.2.5" = "sha256-9wMDB1PGHuzxWiZeRQpGs1m9mTTcjbB7y3kSJomNjeY=";
172:               };
173:             };
174: 
175:             # Disable default web feature for lib-only build
176:             buildNoDefaultFeatures = true;
177: 
178:             inherit buildInputs;
179:             nativeBuildInputs = [
180:               pkgs.pkg-config
181:               rustToolchain
182:             ];
183: 
184:             OPENSSL_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_DIR;
185:             OPENSSL_LIB_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_LIB_DIR;
186:             OPENSSL_INCLUDE_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_INCLUDE_DIR;
187: 
188:             doCheck = true;
189: 
190:             meta = with pkgs.lib; {
191:               description = "A peer-to-peer file sharing CLI built with Iroh";
192:               license = with licenses; [
193:                 mit
194:                 asl20
195:               ];
196:             };
197:           };
198: 
199:           # Default = web
200:           default = self.packages.${system}.id-web;
201:         };
202: 
203:         # =======================================================================
204:         # Apps: nix run .#<name>
205:         # Mirrors all just commands for Nix-native execution
206:         # =======================================================================
207:         apps = {
208:           # Default: run the web-enabled CLI
209:           default = {
210:             type = "app";
211:             program = "${self.packages.${system}.default}/bin/id";
212:           };
213: 
214:           # Run just with any arguments (fallback for commands not added as apps)
215:           just = mkApp (
216:             pkgs.writeShellScriptBin "just-runner" ''
217:               exec ${pkgs.just}/bin/just "$@"
218:             ''
219:           );
220: 
221:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
222:           # Quality checks
223:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
224: 
225:           check = mkApp (mkScript "check" "just check");
226:           ci = mkApp (mkScript "ci" "just ci");
227:           fix = mkApp (mkScript "fix" "just fix");
228:           fmt = mkApp (mkScript "fmt" "just fmt");
229:           fmt-check = mkApp (mkScript "fmt-check" "just fmt-check");
230:           lint = mkApp (mkScript "lint" "just lint");
231:           lint-fix = mkApp (mkScript "lint-fix" "just lint-fix");
232:           cargo-check = mkApp (mkScript "cargo-check" "just cargo-check");
233: 
234:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
235:           # Tests
236:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
237: 
238:           test = mkApp (mkScript "test" "just test");
239:           test-unit = mkApp (mkScript "test-unit" "just test-unit");
240:           test-int = mkApp (mkScript "test-int" "just test-int");
241:           test-one = mkApp (mkScript "test-one" ''just test-one "$@"'');
242:           test-web = mkApp (mkScript "test-web" "just test-web");
243:           test-web-unit = mkApp (mkScript "test-web-unit" "just test-web-unit");
244:           test-web-typecheck = mkApp (mkScript "test-web-typecheck" "just test-web-typecheck");
245:           test-verbose = mkApp (mkScript "test-verbose" "just test-verbose");
246: 
247:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
248:           # Documentation
249:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
250: 
251:           doc = mkApp (mkScript "doc" "just doc");
252:           doc-open = mkApp (mkScript "doc-open" "just doc-open");
253: 
254:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
255:           # Coverage
256:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
257: 
258:           coverage = mkApp (mkScript "coverage" "just coverage");
259:           coverage-open = mkApp (mkScript "coverage-open" "just coverage-open");
260:           coverage-summary = mkApp (mkScript "coverage-summary" "just coverage-summary");
261: 
262:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
263:           # Build commands
264:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
265: 
266:           build = mkApp (mkScript "build" "just build");
267:           build-lib = mkApp (mkScript "build-lib" "just build-lib");
268:           build-force = mkApp (mkScript "build-force" "just build-force");
269:           build-lib-force = mkApp (mkScript "build-lib-force" "just build-lib-force");
270:           build-web-force = mkApp (mkScript "build-web-force" "just build-web-force");
271:           build-cargo = mkApp (mkScript "build-cargo" "just build-cargo");
272:           build-web-cargo = mkApp (mkScript "build-web-cargo" "just build-web-cargo");
273:           build-lib-cargo = mkApp (mkScript "build-lib-cargo" "just build-lib-cargo");
274:           release = mkApp (mkScript "release" "just release");
275:           release-lib = mkApp (mkScript "release-lib" "just release-lib");
276:           release-force = mkApp (mkScript "release-force" "just release-force");
277:           release-lib-force = mkApp (mkScript "release-lib-force" "just release-lib-force");
278:           release-web-force = mkApp (mkScript "release-web-force" "just release-web-force");
279:           release-web-cargo = mkApp (mkScript "release-web-cargo" "just release-web-cargo");
280:           release-lib-cargo = mkApp (mkScript "release-lib-cargo" "just release-lib-cargo");
281: 
282:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
283:           # Web assets
284:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
285: 
286:           assets = mkApp (mkScript "assets" "just assets");
287:           web = mkApp (mkScript "web" "just web");
288:           web-assets = mkApp (mkScript "web-assets" "just web-assets");
289:           web-force = mkApp (mkScript "web-force" "just web-force");
290:           web-assets-force = mkApp (mkScript "web-assets-force" "just web-assets-force");
291:           web-dev = mkApp (mkScript "web-dev" "just web-dev");
292:           web-assets-dev = mkApp (mkScript "web-assets-dev" "just web-assets-dev");
293: 
294:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
295:           # Run commands
296:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
297: 
298:           run = mkApp (mkScript "run" ''just run "$@"'');
299:           repl = mkApp (mkScript "repl" "just repl");
300: 
301:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
302:           # Serve commands
303:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
304: 
305:           serve = mkApp (mkScript "serve" ''just serve "$@"'');
306:           serve-web = mkApp (mkScript "serve-web" ''just serve-web "$@"'');
307:           serve-lib = mkApp (mkScript "serve-lib" ''just serve-lib "$@"'');
308:           build-serve = mkApp (mkScript "build-serve" ''just build-serve "$@"'');
309:           kill = mkApp (mkScript "kill" "just kill");
310:           sleep = mkApp (mkScript "sleep" ''just sleep "$@"'');
311:           kill-serve = mkApp (mkScript "kill-serve" ''just kill-serve "$@"'');
312: 
313:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
314:           # Combined commands
315:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
316: 
317:           build-check = mkApp (mkScript "build-check" "just build-check");
318:           build-check-serve = mkApp (mkScript "build-check-serve" ''just build-check-serve "$@"'');
319:           build-check-serve-lib = mkApp (mkScript "build-check-serve-lib" "just build-check-serve-lib");
320:           build-serve-lib = mkApp (mkScript "build-serve-lib" "just build-serve-lib");
321: 
322:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
323:           # Watch commands
324:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
325: 
326:           watch = mkApp (mkScript "watch" "just watch");
327:           watch-test = mkApp (mkScript "watch-test" "just watch-test");
328:           watch-lint = mkApp (mkScript "watch-lint" "just watch-lint");
329: 
330:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
331:           # Dependency management
332:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
333: 
334:           outdated = mkApp (mkScript "outdated" "just outdated");
335:           audit = mkApp (mkScript "audit" "just audit");
336:           machete = mkApp (mkScript "machete" "just machete");
337:           update = mkApp (mkScript "update" "just update");
338:           tree = mkApp (mkScript "tree" "just tree");
339: 
340:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
341:           # Utilities
342:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
343: 
344:           clean = mkApp (mkScript "clean" "just clean");
345:           loc = mkApp (mkScript "loc" "just loc");
346: 
347:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
348:           # Legacy aliases (backwards compatibility)
349:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
350: 
351:           check-all = mkApp (mkScript "check-all" "just check");
352:           test-lib = mkApp (mkScript "test-lib" "just test-unit");
353:           build-web = mkApp (mkScript "build-web" "just build");
354:           build-web-release = mkApp (mkScript "build-web-release" "just build-web-release");
355:           build-release = mkApp (mkScript "build-release" "just release");
356:           build-lib-release = mkApp (mkScript "build-lib-release" "just release-lib");
357:           web-build = mkApp (mkScript "web-build" "just web");
358:           web-typecheck = mkApp (mkScript "web-typecheck" "just test-web");
359:           watch-build = mkApp (mkScript "watch-build" "just watch");
360:         };
361:       }
362:     );
363: }
